Our Services

A complete ML platform — from architecture design to production deployment.

Layer Editor Studio

Visual drag-and-drop neural network builder with 50+ pre-built layer types. Design CNNs, RNNs, Transformers, GANs, and hybrid architectures. Real-time shape inference and compatibility validation.

  • 50+ layer types
  • Real-time shape validation
  • Architecture templates
  • Custom layer support
  • Export to PyTorch/TensorFlow
IncludedGet Started →

Hyperparameter Tuner

Automated hyperparameter optimization with Bayesian, grid, random, and evolutionary search strategies. Parallel trial execution with early stopping and pruning for efficient resource usage.

  • 4 search strategies
  • Parallel trials
  • Early stopping
  • Parameter importance ranking
  • Visualization dashboard
From $49/moGet Started →

Training Monitor

Real-time experiment tracking with live loss curves, metric comparison, GPU utilization monitoring, and automated anomaly detection. Compare runs side-by-side.

  • Live metrics streaming
  • Multi-run comparison
  • GPU monitoring
  • Anomaly alerts
  • Custom metric support
From $29/moGet Started →

Model Registry

Enterprise-grade model versioning with automatic metadata capture, lineage tracking, A/B test integration, and compliance audit trails. Never lose track of your best models.

  • Semantic versioning
  • Lineage tracking
  • A/B deployment
  • Audit trails
  • Team collaboration
From $79/moGet Started →

GPU Scheduler

Intelligent cloud GPU orchestration across NVIDIA A100, H100, and L40S instances. Spot instance optimization, priority queuing, and cost-aware scheduling reduce training costs by up to 70%.

  • Multi-cloud support
  • Spot optimization
  • Priority queues
  • Cost analytics
  • Auto-scaling
Pay-per-useGet Started →

Deployment Pipeline

One-click model deployment to REST APIs, batch pipelines, or edge devices. Automatic conversion to ONNX, TensorRT, and CoreML with performance benchmarking.

  • REST API endpoints
  • Batch inference
  • Edge export
  • Auto-scaling
  • A/B testing
From $99/moGet Started →
